headline: VIRF estimates are exposed in full so you can read the result and reproduce it manually.

sections.title: What is shown on this page
items: Figures included: Volatility impulse response, Variance impulse response.

sections.title: How to read the main result
items: The reported shock size is 1.25 sigma.
The volatility path shows the level of implied volatility after the shock, while the variance-response plot shows the raw variance adjustment.
Persistence close to 1 means the shock decays slowly.

sections.title: What a normal paper should report
items: A table listing volatility or variance responses by horizon.

sections.title: Manual replication focus
items: Recover omega, alpha, and beta from the fitted GARCH(1,1) specification.
Rebuild the VIRF path from the documented recurrence formula and shock size.
Compare both the volatility and variance response outputs horizon by horizon.
